# GoGlobalEdTechPvtLtd

GoGlobalEdTechPvtLtd is an India-based study abroad consultancy that helps students plan, apply, and succeed overseas. We provide free counselling, university shortlisting, admissions documentation, visa guidance, and MBBS abroad support.

## Core Services
- Study abroad counselling and shortlisting
- University admissions and documentation support
- SOP/LOR writing assistance
- Test preparation guidance
- Education loan and scholarship assistance
- Visa processing support
- Accommodation guidance

## Primary Audience
- Students in India seeking undergraduate or postgraduate study abroad
- Students exploring MBBS abroad options

## Location & Contact
- Address: 162 B Brijeshwari NXB, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India
- Phone: +91 91666 64558
- Email: goglobalstudyedtech@gmail.com
